description: Severe stringing and wispy hairs between two calibration towers; small blobs at layer transitions. Travel moves leave cobwebs, worse when the nozzle pauses. Printed hot at 235C with 1.0mm retraction. Looking for stringing fixes.
Large flat plate (200x90mm) curled up at two corners (corner lift) around layer 10–15. Printed on smooth PEI with no brim, bed 60C, fan at 100% from layer 2. Classic warping/bed adhesion failure.

Part cracked along layer lines (layer separation) after removing supports. Visible delamination on tall walls; feels brittle. Printed at 240C with part cooling fan on ~30%. Suspect poor layer adhesion.
First layer lines are not bonding; gaps between tracks and occasional peeling at edges. Z offset likely too high. Bed 60C, initial layer speed was fast. Classic first layer adhesion issue.
Ripple/ghosting visible after sharp corners (ringing). Vertical faces show echo waves parallel to edges. Printed fast (~120 mm/s) with high acceleration; need ringing fixes.
